# Generated by rhis_installer.sh

This directory contains generated/supporting documentation artifacts used by
the RHIS workflow.

- Source-of-truth operational docs live in root `README.md` and `CHECKLIST.md`.
- Regenerated artifacts may be overwritten by subsequent `rhis_installer.sh` runs.

Current orchestration behavior summary:

- VM creation/build order: `IdM -> Satellite -> AAP`
- Config-as-code order: `IdM -> Satellite -> AAP`
- AAP callback wait now includes visible progress heartbeat and fail-fast
  detection when no callback-stage progress is observed.

Configuration policy summary:

- IPs/hostnames/usernames in RHIS are treated as defaults and can be changed
  during prompts (`--reconfigure`).
- Prompted values are persisted in encrypted `~/.ansible/conf/env.yml` and
  reused on subsequent runs.
